description: Fixtures for new sales workflows (2 per workflow, 10 total)

input.lead_data: Enterprise SaaS opportunity, 500-seat deployment, $250K ACV, VP of Engineering champion
input.icp_definition: Mid-market to enterprise SaaS companies with 500+ employees, engineering-led culture

input.lead_data: SMB inbound lead, 25-person startup, $12K ARR, founder as decision-maker
input.icp_definition: SMB technology startups with 10-100 employees, product-led growth motion

input.buyer_requirements: Enterprise analytics platform for 200 analysts, SSO integration, on-prem deployment option
input.solution_scope: Enterprise tier with advanced analytics module, professional services for implementation
input.pricing_framework: Per-seat licensing with annual commitment, 15% volume discount threshold

input.buyer_requirements: CRM replacement for 50-person sales team, Salesforce migration, mobile access required
input.solution_scope: Professional tier with migration services, 12-month implementation support
input.pricing_framework: Per-user monthly billing, standard discount policy up to 10%

input.contract_terms: 3-year MSA with enterprise buyer, $500K total value, custom SLA requirements
input.negotiation_objectives: Protect margin above 60%, limit liability to contract value, secure 3-year commitment
input.counterparty_position: Buyer demands unlimited liability, 99.99% SLA, and annual price reduction of 5%

input.contract_terms: Annual renewal with 20% expansion, existing customer, standard terms with minor modifications
input.negotiation_objectives: Secure multi-year commitment, expand seat count, maintain pricing
input.counterparty_position: Customer requests 10% discount on expansion seats and extended payment terms

input.account_data: Fortune 500 financial services, $1.2M ARR, 3-year customer, 85% NPS, 3 business units using platform
input.relationship_history: CFO sponsor, VP Engineering champion, 2 detractors in IT, quarterly business reviews active
input.expansion_signals: New business unit onboarding, increased usage in analytics module, RFP for adjacent product

input.account_data: Mid-market tech company, $180K ARR, 18-month customer, declining usage, support ticket spike
input.relationship_history: Original champion left company, new VP evaluating alternatives, limited executive engagement
input.expansion_signals: No expansion signals, competitor POC detected, contract renewal in 4 months

input.pipeline_data: 42 active opportunities totaling $4.8M, 8 in late-stage, 15 in proposal, 19 in discovery
input.historical_close_rates: Late-stage: 68%, Proposal: 42%, Discovery: 18%, overall quarterly close rate: 31%

input.pipeline_data: Full-year pipeline $18M across 4 quarters, 120 opportunities, 3 segments: enterprise, mid-market, SMB
input.historical_close_rates: Enterprise: 25%, Mid-market: 35%, SMB: 45%, seasonal Q4 spike of 15%
